proofs.control: Canonical schema ownership is explicitly defined
proofs.notes: 36 tables have explicit owner assignments across 5 owners (api, worker, discord-bot, platform, ingestor). Defined in canonicalSchema with TypeScript type enforcement.

proofs.control: Service boundaries are clearly defined and enforced

evidence.invariant: CLAUDE.md invariant 8: Apps own side effects. Packages never import from apps. Apps never import from apps.

proofs.notes: ESLint enforces app isolation: 8 restricted import patterns prevent cross-app imports. CLAUDE.md invariant 8 codifies the rule.

proofs.control: All writes flow through a single authoritative API layer

evidence.canonical_writer: apps/api — "This is the ONLY canonical DB writer — no other app writes directly" (apps/api/CLAUDE.md)
enforcement: Repository pattern — services receive RepositoryBundle, never create DB clients

proofs.notes: apps/api is the single canonical DB writer. All other apps are read-only or submit via HTTP to the API. Enforced by architecture docs + repository pattern.

proofs.control: Critical services fail fast on invalid configuration

evidence.api_fail_closed: apps/api fail_closed mode — refuses to start without DB credentials (auth.ts, server.ts)
evidence.env_check: pnpm env:check (validate-env.mjs) — validates required shared keys at build time
evidence.config_loader: @unit-talk/config loadEnvironment() — three-layer merge with explicit key resolution
evidence.test_coverage: governance-readiness.test.ts — asserts fail_closed mode rejects startup without credentials

proofs.notes: API uses fail_closed mode in production — refuses to start without DB credentials. pnpm env:check validates config at build time. Tested in governance-readiness.test.ts.

proofs.control: Environment configuration is validated at startup

evidence.validation_script: scripts/validate-env.mjs — checks required keys, warns about secrets in shared files
evidence.ci_integration: pnpm verify runs env:check as first step — fails pipeline on missing config

proofs.notes: Environment validated at startup via validate-env.mjs (pnpm env:check). Runs as first step of pnpm verify. Config loader handles three-layer merge with process.env override.

proofs.control: No cross-service direct data mutation occurs

enforcement: Repository pattern — services receive bundles, never create clients
Writer authority: packages/db/src/writer-authority.ts — 5 registered fields with explicit write auth
evidence.all_writes_through_api: audit_log actors trace back to API service paths (submission, promotion, settlement)

proofs.notes: No cross-service mutation: ESLint enforces import boundaries, repository pattern prevents direct DB access. 10 distinct audit actors all trace to API service paths.

evidence.coverage: Schema ownership, service boundaries, single writer, fail-fast, env validation, no cross-mutation all proven above

proofs.notes: All 6 architecture sub-controls proven. FND-ARCH-001 is the umbrella control — its components are individually verified above.
